title: Dashboard enhancements and bug fixes
body:
* **Import BI files is generally available**: Importing Power BI and Tableau reports as AI/BI dashboards with Genie Code is now generally available. You can also start an import directly from the dashboard list page. See [Import BI files using Genie Code](/aws/en/dashboards/manage/import-bi).
* **Dashboard Ask Genie is generally available**: The **Ask Genie** button on published dashboards is now generally available. See [Genie Agents with dashboards](/aws/en/dashboards/genie-spaces).
* **Ask Genie handles partially supported datasets**: When only some datasets in a dashboard use unsupported SQL expressions, Ask Genie now answers from the supported datasets instead of failing. See  [Incompatible SQL expressions](/aws/en/dashboards/genie-spaces#sql-expressions).
* **English names for choropleth regions**: Choropleth maps now support English region names from the `name_en` column as the identifier for admin-0 (country) boundaries. See [Region](/aws/en/dashboards/manage/visualizations/maps#region).
* **Hide pivot table column headers**: Authors can now hide the column header in a pivot table. See [Value-level settings](/aws/en/dashboards/manage/visualizations/tables#value-level-settings).
* **Genie Code on by default for compliance security profile**: For workspaces with a compliance security profile (CSP), Genie Code for dashboard authoring is now turned on by default and runs on Databricks-hosted models. See [Use Genie Code for dashboard authoring](/aws/en/dashboards/manage/dashboard-agent).
* **Empty multi-select filter defaults in Genie Code**: Genie Code can now use an empty multi-select ("All") default for parameter filters instead of requiring a single default value.
* **Cluster-by and partition-by for local metric views**: Local metric views now support cluster-by and partition-by configuration in the UI and YAML. See [Local metric views](/aws/en/dashboards/manage/data-modeling/local-metric-views).
* **Apply filters fix**: Fixed a bug where the apply button on filters cleared the text input instead of applying the filter.
* **Dashboard import fix**: Fixed a bug where importing a dashboard failed if it contained a bookmark that referenced a deleted widget.
